hcp.title: HCP Profiles
hcp.emptyBody: Create your first HCP profile to start building training scenarios.
hcp.deleteConfirm: Delete HCP Profile: This will permanently remove this profile and unassign it from all scenarios. This action cannot be undone.
hcp.agentNoneTooltip: AI Foundry not configured or sync not attempted
hcp.deleteConfirmWithAgent: Delete HCP Profile: This will permanently remove this profile, delete its AI Foundry agent, and unassign it from all scenarios. This action cannot be undone.
hcp.name: Name
hcp.saveFirstForVoice: Save profile first to enable voice test
hcp.connectToTest: Click Connect to test voice conversation
hcp.startSpeaking: Start speaking or type a message...
hcp.overridePlaceholder: Leave empty to use auto-generated instructions
hcp.deleteConfirmAgent: Delete this HCP profile? This will also delete the linked AI Foundry Agent.
hcp.voiceLiveEnabledDesc: Sync voice, avatar and conversation settings as agent metadata for Voice Live sessions
hcp.voiceLiveModelDesc: Generative AI model for Voice Live sessions (model mode only)
hcp.voiceModeDescription: Enable Voice Live for real-time voice interaction with this agent
hcp.instructionsHint: Click the wand to generate instructions from profile data
hcp.toolsPlaceholder: Function Call tools configuration coming soon
hcp.playgroundDisabledNoVl: Assign a Voice Live instance to test
hcp.instructionsError: Failed to generate instructions. Check profile data and try again.
hcp.permissionDeniedMic: Microphone access denied. Please allow microphone permission and try again.
hcp.permissionDeniedCamera: Camera access denied. Please allow camera permission and try again.
hcp.playgroundChatReady: Send a message to chat with the AI Foundry Agent
hcp.playgroundChatNoAgent: Agent not synced - sync the agent first to enable chat
hcp.playgroundVoiceHint: Click Start to begin a voice session

scenarios.title: Training Scenarios
scenarios.emptyBody: Create your first training scenario by assigning an HCP profile and configuring key messages.
scenarios.deleteConfirm: Delete Scenario: This will permanently remove this scenario. Existing session history will be preserved.

rubrics.title: Scoring Rubrics
rubrics.emptyBody: Create your first scoring rubric to define custom scoring criteria for training scenarios.
rubrics.deleteConfirm: Delete Rubric: This will permanently remove this rubric. Scenarios using the default rubric will fall back to their configured weights.
rubrics.name: Rubric Name

azureConfig.title: Azure Service Configuration
azureConfig.connectionFailed: Connection test failed. Verify the endpoint and API key are correct.

aiFoundry.title: Azure AI Foundry
aiFoundry.description: Unified AI endpoint — all services derive from this single configuration
aiFoundry.apiKeyHint: Leave empty to keep existing key

services.title: Service Configuration
services.description: Enable/disable individual services and set service-specific deployment names

azureConfig.avatarRegionHint: Azure AI Avatar is available in: East US 2, North Europe, South Central US, Southeast Asia, Sweden Central, West Europe, West US 2
azureConfig.voiceLiveRegionHint: Voice Live API is available in most Azure regions. Agent mode requires specific AI Foundry regions.
azureConfig.contentHint: Requires a Microsoft Foundry Resource (not a standard Cognitive Services resource).
azureConfig.realtimeHint: Requires gpt-4o-realtime-preview or gpt-realtime model deployment.
azureConfig.contentTestSuccess: Content Understanding service connected. Analyzers accessible.
azureConfig.contentTestFailed: Content Understanding connection failed. Verify this is a Foundry Resource endpoint.
azureConfig.realtimeTestFailed: Realtime deployment not found. Verify the deployment name supports realtime audio.
azureConfig.voiceLiveTestFailed: Voice Live API connection failed. Verify the endpoint and API key.
azureConfig.avatarTestSuccess: Avatar service reachable. ICE relay token retrieved.
azureConfig.avatarTestFailed: Avatar connection failed. Verify the region supports Avatar synthesis.

materials.title: Training Materials
materials.description: Manage training documents for AI knowledge base
materials.uploadDescription: Drag and drop files here, or click to browse
materials.uploadHint: Supported formats: PDF, Word (.docx), Excel (.xlsx). Max 50MB.
materials.name: Material Name
materials.archiveConfirm: Are you sure you want to archive this material?
materials.restoreConfirm: Are you sure you want to restore this material?

minAudienceWarning: Conference scenarios require at least 2 HCP audience members.

errors.hcpSaveFailed: Could not save HCP profile. Check required fields and try again.
errors.scenarioSaveFailed: Could not save scenario. Check required fields and try again.
errors.connectionTestFailed: Connection test failed. Verify the endpoint and API key are correct.
errors.rubricSaveFailed: Could not save rubric. Check required fields and try again.
errors.materialUploadFailed: Could not upload material. Check the file and try again.
errors.materialUpdateFailed: Could not update material. Check required fields and try again.

voiceLive.name: Azure Voice Live API
voiceLive.description: Real-time voice coaching with configurable model
voiceLive.regionWarning: Voice Live API is available in most Azure regions. Some models and Agent mode may have regional restrictions. Check the Azure documentation for your region.
voiceLive.agentModeDesc: Azure AI Agent Service with pre-configured HCP persona agent
voiceLive.agentIdRequired: Agent ID is required for Agent mode
voiceLive.projectNameRequired: Project Name is required for Agent mode
voiceLive.title: Voice Live Management
voiceLive.pageDescription: Manage reusable Voice Live configuration instances. Create instances and assign them to HCP profiles.
voiceLive.batchResyncError: Failed to batch re-sync agents. Please try again.
voiceLive.emptyBody: Create your first Voice Live configuration instance to get started.
voiceLive.loadError: Failed to load Voice Live instances. Click retry to try again.
voiceLive.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"?
voiceLive.deleteConflict: Cannot delete: {{count}} HCP profile(s) still reference this instance.
voiceLive.instanceNamePlaceholder: e.g. Sales Coach - Chinese Female Voice
voiceLive.migrateHint: This HCP has inline voice settings. Assign an instance to use shared configuration.
voiceLive.vlDialogAgentInstructionsHint: Override default agent instructions for this instance (optional)
voiceLive.assignDialogDescription: Select an HCP profile to assign to "{{name}}"
voiceLive.assignError: Failed to assign instance to HCP
voiceLive.readOnlyDescription: Voice/avatar settings come from the assigned Voice Live Instance. Edit in Voice Live Management.
voiceLive.removeInstanceConfirm: Remove Voice Live Instance "{{name}}" from this HCP? The HCP will fall back to inline settings.
voiceLive.knowledgePlaceholderBody: Knowledge base configuration (product materials, clinical references) will be available in a future update.
voiceLive.toolsPlaceholderBody: Function Call tool configuration will be available in a future update.
